title: Lead SEO Specialist at EaseMyTrip Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at EaseMyTrip Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Join the EaseMyTrip Holdings Services family as a SEO Specialist in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About EaseMyTrip Holdings Services:
EaseMyTrip Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip Holdings Services!
